positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, silhouetted fauna, such as stylized hummingbirds and foxes, wandering through ancient, root-filled trees. The composition should be centered and balanced, with the main elements clustered in the foreground for high visual impact. Style: Deep jewel tones mixed with ethereal electric cyan and gold accents. Strong contrast between deep indigo shadows and vibrant glowing elements. Flat graphic style with slight depth, suitable for a repeating pattern or apparel print. Clean lines, vector aesthetic, high saturation, art deco influence, high contrast.
